title: Are Mushrooms USING Us To Travel To Outer Space?
summary: A brief discussion exploring Terence McKenna's concept that psilocybin mushrooms may be using humans as a vehicle for interstellar travel, suggesting mushrooms could be guiding humanity toward space exploration for their own propagation purposes.

key_claims.claim: Terence McKenna reported that mushrooms communicated to him knowledge of hyper light drive ships and how to build them in exchange for transportation to new worlds
Mushrooms may be using humans to help them germinate and spread to other planets
